detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Friendchips._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#2087-2199):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(amountToSwapForETH) (Friendchips.sol#2121)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp + 400) (Friendchips.sol#2247-2259)
	- addLiquidity(liquidityTokens,ethForLiquidity) (Friendchips.sol#2137)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp + 400) (Friendchips.sol#2209-2223)
	External calls sending eth:
	- addLiquidity(liquidityTokens,ethForLiquidity) (Friendchips.sol#2137)
		- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp + 400) (Friendchips.sol#2209-2223)
	- address(address(teamWallet)).transfer(address(this).balance) (Friendchips.sol#2151)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (Friendchips.sol#2157)
		- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds balance) (Friendchips.sol#1723)
		- _balances[recipient] = _balances[recipient].add(amount) (Friendchips.sol#1725)
	ERC20._balances (Friendchips.sol#1341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._burn(address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1789-1801)
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1751-1763)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1715-1729)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (Friendchips.sol#1473-1477)

		- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds balance) (Friendchips.sol#1723)
		- _balances[recipient] = _balances[recipient].add(amount) (Friendchips.sol#1725)
	ERC20._balances (Friendchips.sol#1341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._burn(address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1789-1801)
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1751-1763)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1715-1729)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (Friendchips.sol#1473-1477)
	- super._transfer(sender,recipient,sendAmount) (Friendchips.sol#2195)
		- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds balance) (Friendchips.sol#1723)
		- _balances[recipient] = _balances[recipient].add(amount) (Friendchips.sol#1725)
	ERC20._balances (Friendchips.sol#1341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._burn(address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1789-1801)
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1751-1763)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Friendchips.sol#1715-1729)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (Friendchips.sol#1473-1477)
